feedback.text: Dear EU Comission, i'd like to sugest to add a bit of customer protection in the field of videogames. I'd hate to buy a game while having to fear that publishers go ahead and cancel a game service because upkeeping it is too costly. Modern videogames often times require an online connection whether you play by youself or with others and if for some reason or another publishers reserve and execute a right to end a game i or others enjoy, i'd feel robbed. Have a nice day!
